definition.config: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="config_start" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">basic_execution</field><field name="comment"></field><value name="value"><block type="config_number_variable"><field name="name">basic_execution</field><field name="value">1</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">limit_max_health</field><field name="comment"></field><value name="value"><block type="config_number_variable"><field name="name">limit_max_health</field><field name="value">60</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">precision_mode</field><field name="comment"></field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">precision_mode</field><field name="value">false</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">machine_protection</field><field name="comment"></field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">machine_protection</field><field name="value">true</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">infestation_amount</field><field name="comment"></field><value name="value"><block type="config_number_variable"><field name="name">infestation_amount</field><field name="value">0.12</field></block></value></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
